_comment: promptlint v3 — DEFAULT OFF / silent. Hook is installed but does nothing until you type ':lint on'. Token reporter is separate and stays on by default. To disable token reporter: ':lint tokens off' (creates ~/.claude/promptlint.tokens.disabled).
_safety_note: v2 had a 'type: prompt' Haiku LLM hook that could BLOCK prompts including meta-questions. That hook is REMOVED. v3 is rules-only by default. If you want LLM-judge, set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and the Python hook will use it as a smart enhancement (still respects the on/off state).
